| PS PorterPicks 12:36AM
BOWL GANE BONUS UNDERDOG SELECTION for
TUESDAY
~>
MUSIC Ul Y BOWL
ILLINOIS (+3.5) over Tennessee
(4-UNITS) BOOS
2:30pm PST - ESPN
The VOLS defense is atrocious! It’s that simple! They
allowed 28.ppg and close to 400 yards ppg. Illinois
quarterback Luke Altmyer is going to have plenty of
success moving the football up and down the field on
this Vols defense. The only reason why Tennessee is a
favorite in this game is because they represent the
SEC and the fact this game is being played in
Nashville, TN.
Illinois has played the more tougher strength of
schedule this season and keep in mind too that
Tennessee has only one victory over one team that's
in a Bowl Game this season and that’s Mississippi
State who has a losing record. With Tennessee not
having a DC and the fact they are already a struggling
defense allowing a ton of yards and points, and the
fact the Vols are only 3-7 ATS in their last 10 games,
Illinois is the SHARP side in this Bowl Game,
especially catching points with the better defense.
Done reading? Check out other channels. ©
